shell.toast.link_limit: You can add up to 5 links.
shell.toast.badge_limit: You can select up to 3 badges.
shell.toast.logout_all_error: Failed to log out from all sessions.
shell.toast.password_changed: Password changed. Please sign in again.
shell.toast.password_set: Password set. You can now sign in with email and password.
shell.toast.discord_link_url_error: Failed to get Discord link URL.
shell.toast.2fa_email_required: Two-factor authentication requires a registered email address.
shell.toast.discord_already: This Discord account is already linked.
shell.toast.discord_conflict: This Discord account is linked to another account.
shell.confirm.discord_unlink: Unlink Discord? Discord login will no longer be available.
shell.confirm.2fa_enable_send: Send a verification code to enable two-factor authentication?
shell.confirm.2fa_disable_send: Send a verification code to disable two-factor authentication?
shell.confirm.unsaved_close: You have unsaved changes. Close anyway?
shell.static.bio_placeholder: Enter a short bio (up to 300 characters)
shell.static.user_id_hint: 4-20 chars, start with a letter, letters/numbers/_/- only
shell.static.send_verify_code_notice: A verification code will be sent.
shell.static.url_hint: Enter a URL starting with https://
shell.static.password_set_desc: Once set, you can also log in with your email address and password.
shell.help.search_item1: Use the header search to filter by title, ALT text, tags, and users.
shell.help.search_item2: Use the sidebar to combine tags, color tags, shot date, posted date, and archive filters.
shell.help.search_item3: Archive counts are recalculated against the current filters and stay in sync when conditions change.
shell.help.view_item1: Open a card to view the image in the image modal.
shell.help.view_item2: Use the details button to check shot date, posted date, tags, and color tags.
shell.help.view_item3: Select the uploader icon to open the profile modal.
shell.help.account_item1: Open your account from the icon in the top-right corner.
shell.help.account_item2: In your profile, you can edit your display name, bio, and links.
shell.help.account_item3: Click badges or icons to view them in a larger preview.
shell.help.settings_item1: Change language and theme from display settings.
shell.help.settings_item2: You can also change how images open and other display behavior.
shell.help.contact_item1: If you run into a problem, bug, or request, send it from Contact.
shell.help.contact_item2: Choosing the matching category first makes it easier to review.
shell.help.faq_q1: Are there features that require login?
shell.help.faq_a1: Some features require login, including profile editing, contact, and uploads.
shell.help.faq_q2: How do I get more badges?
shell.help.faq_a2: Some badges are granted automatically when you meet the conditions, and some are granted by admins.
shell.help.faq_q3: I want to browse images by uploader.
shell.help.faq_a3: Open the uploader's profile to browse that user's posts more easily.
shell.help.faq_q4: Where can I see image information?
shell.help.faq_a4: You can check it from the image details.
shell.help.faq_q5: What should I do if the display is hard to read?
shell.help.faq_a5: Change the language or display behavior from Settings.
shell.help.faq_q6: Where can I send bug reports or requests?
shell.help.faq_a6: You can send them from Contact in the account menu.
admin_content.duplicate_short: Duplicate images were detected, so nothing was uploaded.
admin_content.max_files: You can upload up to {count} images.
admin_content.page_description: Manage visibility changes, quarantine, restore, and deleted-state content.
admin_content.upload_files_hint: PNG / JPG / WEBP, up to 20 files. All selected images are submitted in one post.
admin_users.close_create_confirm: There is unsaved input. Close anyway?
admin_users.close_edit_confirm: There are unsaved changes. Close anyway?
admin_users.page_description: Browse users, edit profiles, and create temporary users.
admin_users.create_result_meta: This is intended to be used for the first-time setup flow once that screen is implemented.
admin_mail.recipient_select_meta: Select recipient users. When sending to all users, the audit log is recorded as @everyone.
admin_mail.subject: Subject
admin_mail.history_meta: Stored so it can be reused for future announcements.
admin_layout.discard_confirm_message: There are unsaved changes. Discard them and continue?
admin_audit.detail_load_error: Failed to load audit log details.
admin_audit.page_description: View audit logs, inspect details, and export CSV.
admin_settings.group_general_desc: Manage the site name and default image modal behavior.
admin_settings.group_security_desc: Manage password policy and session defaults.
admin_settings.group_smtp_desc: Manage sender information and SMTP connection settings.
admin_settings.group_storage_desc: Manage storage paths and upload limits.
admin_settings.group_integrity_desc: Manage scheduled integrity checks, cadence, run time, and retention.
admin_settings.page_description: Manage site-wide operational settings. Personal display preferences such as the dashboard remain per-admin.
admin_settings.field_default_meta_pinned: Keep the image meta bar pinned by default
admin_settings.storage_config_meta: Manage source_root / storage_root / original_cache_root and upload limits here.
admin_settings.storage_usage_meta: Shows directory size and destination filesystem usage based on the saved source_root / storage_root / original_cache_root.
admin_settings.integrity_hero_descriptio: Regularly checks source / DB / derived files / color data. Disabled means no scheduled run, but settings can still be saved.
admin_settings.integrity_rule_meta: Only the required inputs are shown for the selected execution method.
admin_settings.interval_days_hint: Example: entering 3 runs it every 3 days.
admin_settings.weekly_days_help: Used only when weekly is selected.
admin_settings.integrity_report_meta: Controls report retention period and operation notes.
admin_settings.report_retention_hint: Used as a guideline when cleaning up old JSON reports.
admin_settings.operation_note_body: Queue manual runs from the dashboard. Actual scheduled execution is expected to be handled by a periodic dispatcher such as a systemd timer.
admin_settings.storage_idle: Usage has not been loaded yet.
admin_settings.storage_placeholder: Usage information will appear here after loading.
admin_settings.discard_move: You have unsaved changes. Discard them and continue?
admin_settings.path_unset_help: This path is not configured. Save a path to show usage information here.
admin_settings.path_missing_parent_usage: The path itself does not exist yet. Usage is shown relative to the parent directory {path}.
admin_settings.path_missing_usage: The path does not exist, so usage could not be calculated.
admin_settings.path_special_file: This is a special file and is excluded from directory usage calculations.
admin_settings.path_directory_usage: Shows total real files under the directory and the destination filesystem usage.
admin_settings.path_file_usage: Shows the file size and the destination filesystem usage.
admin_settings.integrity_disabled: This is currently disabled. No scheduled run will occur after saving, but the settings are kept.
admin_settings.integrity_run_at_hint: Set a run time to show the future execution rule here.
admin_settings.integrity_weekday_require: No weekdays selected. Select at least one weekday.
admin_settings.integrity_help_interval: Runs at the same time every specified number of days.
admin_settings.integrity_help_weekly: Runs at the specified time only on the selected weekdays.
admin_settings.integrity_help_daily: Runs once a day at the specified time.
admin_dashboard.recent_logs_empty: There are no recent activity logs.
admin_dashboard.storage_idle: Storage usage has not been loaded yet.
admin_dashboard.storage_placeholder: Storage usage will appear here after loading.
admin_dashboard.clock_meta: The display mode is saved per admin.
admin_dashboard.latest_empty: No image is available to display.
admin_dashboard.stats_meta: Shows gallery-wide counts and storage summary.
admin_dashboard.storage_meta: Automatically fetches usage for storage_root. Shares the same refresh interval as the settings page.
admin_dashboard.storage_auto_refresh_lab: Dashboard storage monitor auto refresh interval
admin_dashboard.integrity_meta: Shows the latest status, recent issues, and manual run scheduling.
admin_dashboard.active_users_meta: Shows users currently accessing the site and their session time.
admin_dashboard.page_description: Review access status, activity logs, and the latest image in one screen.
admin_layout.init_error: Failed to initialize the admin console.
admin_layout.loading_desc: The admin console will render after the admin permission check completes.
admin_layout.discard_move: You have unsaved changes. Discard them and continue?
admin_layout.not_found_desc: The page you requested was not found.
admin_layout.error_desc: An error occurred while initializing the admin console.
admin_layout.sidebar_footer: The admin console is shown only after permission checks complete.
special.error_message: A problem occurred while processing your request. Please try again later.
special.error.aside_copy: Use this page when you want to separate dedicated failure screens from lightweight errors that can stay in a toast.
special.error.list_minor_value: Retrying lists or fixing input issues can stay in existing toasts or modals.
special.error.list_dedicated_value: Use this for initialization failures, access mismatches, or maintenance routing.
special.not_found.title: Page not found
special.not_found.description: The URL may have changed or the page may no longer be public. Please return to the gallery top and search again for the image or profile.
special.not_found.meta: This is the not-found page for public routes under .
special.not_found.aside_copy: Checking the following items in order makes it easier to distinguish broken links from visibility restrictions.
special.not_found.list_link_value: Confirm the trailing URL and the path under / are correct.
special.not_found.list_visibility_value: Confirm the image or profile is not private or quarantined.
special.not_found.list_retry_value: Search again from the top page using search, tags, or archive.
special.not_found.footer_note: Use this together with Apache or reverse-proxy 404 routing.
special.maintenance.title: This page is under construction
special.maintenance.description: This route is temporarily closed while it is being prepared. The main gallery and existing public pages remain available.
special.maintenance.meta: Guidance page for unreleased features and in-progress screens.
special.maintenance.aside_copy: Intended for temporarily guiding users around unpublished admin routes, adjusting frontend features, and screens during migration.
special.maintenance.list_unreleased_valu: The feature is still in development, but the URL already exists.
special.maintenance.list_migration_value: A temporary stop notice while switching from the old route to the new one.
special.maintenance.list_tone_value: Show guidance without breaking the gallery's color and typography.
special.sorry.title: This route is currently unavailable
special.sorry.description: This page is intentionally paused for cases such as access restrictions, invitation-only access, or pre-maintenance guidance. Please check permissions and visibility.
special.sorry.meta: Use this when you want to intentionally return guidance separate from 404 or maintenance.
special.sorry.aside_copy: This page explicitly explains a route that exists but is currently blocked for a reason, rather than a missing page.
special.sorry.list_404_value: The URL itself is expected, but the route is unavailable right now.
special.sorry.list_maintenance_value: It can be used not only during active work, but also for restrictions or guidance.
special.sorry.list_route_value: Guide the user back naturally to the top page or auth page.

support.common.title: Support
support.modal.default.heading: Support Felixxsv Gallery
support.modal.default.description:
This is a support plan to help keep Felixxsv Gallery running and improving.
Supporters can use perks such as supporter badges and profile decorations.
Support is 500 JPY per month and can be stopped at any time.
support.modal.active.heading: You are currently supporting
support.modal.active.description:
Thank you for supporting Felixxsv Gallery.
Supporter perks are currently available.
You can change decorations and visibility from profile editing.
support.modal.cancelScheduled.heading: Support will stop soon
support.modal.cancelScheduled.descriptio:
Supporter perks remain available until the current support period ends.
After that, current supporter perks stop, but earned cumulative achievements remain.
support.modal.expired.heading: Support Again
support.modal.expired.description:
Thank you for supporting Felixxsv Gallery in the past.
Your earned cumulative achievements are kept.
Supporting again re-enables Supporter perks.
support.modal.giftActive.heading: Currently Available
support.modal.giftActive.description:
Supporter perks are currently available.
If you start monthly support now, billing starts after the current access period ends.
support.modal.permanent.heading: Currently Available
support.modal.permanent.description:
Supporter perks are currently available.
Starting monthly support will not change the perks. It can be started as a way to support operations.
support.benefits.iconFrame.label: Icon frame
support.benefits.slideshow.label: Slideshow
support.benefits.secret1.label: Secret
